    • Uses of Curtain in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.commands

      Constructor parameters in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.commands with type arguments of type Curtain 
      Constructor and Description
      MoveObjectCommand(Cabin cabin, java.util.ArrayList<Row> rowlist, java.util.ArrayList<Seat> seatlist, java.util.ArrayList<Galley> galleylist, java.util.ArrayList<Lavatory> lavatorylist, java.util.ArrayList<Curtain> curtainlist)
      This command gets all physical object elements that are selected by the user, submits it via lists and performs the manipulation of the corresponding object inside the cabin element.
